CREATE TABLE Airlines (AirlineID UInt32, FlightID UInt32, PassengerCount UInt32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY AirlineID;
SELECT anyHeavy(AirlineID) AS res FROM Airlines;
CREATE TABLE Flights (FlightID UInt32, AirlineID UInt32, Origin String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY FlightID;
SELECT anyHeavy(AirlineID) AS res FROM (SELECT AirlineID FROM Airlines WHERE Fate = 'Delayed') AS DelayedFlights;
SELECT anyHeavy(AirlineID) AS res FROM Airlines GROUP BY PassengerCount;
SELECT a.AirlineID, anyHeavy(a.PassengerCount) AS HeavyPassengerCount FROM Airlines AS a GROUP BY a.AirlineID;
SELECT anyHeavy(a.AirlineID) FROM Airlines a JOIN Flights f ON a.FlightID = f.FlightID GROUP BY f.Origin;
SELECT anyHeavy(FlightID) FROM (SELECT FlightID FROM Flights WHERE AirlineID IN (SELECT anyHeavy(AirlineID) FROM Airlines));
SELECT anyHeavy(AirlineID) AS frequentAirline FROM Airlines WHERE AirlineID IN (SELECT AirlineID FROM Flights WHERE Origin = 'NYC');
SELECT anyHeavy(AirlineID) FROM (SELECT AirlineID FROM Airlines ORDER BY PassengerCount DESC LIMIT 10) AS TopAirlines;
